sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78204" key="paraklu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρακλύω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <sense id="n78204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παρακούω</ref> </xr> IV, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.255</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
